TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Wi-al-na.Hay-sen-paw "kamu nu Te, Werner Heisenberg, 1901 a mihca 12 a bulad 5 demiad katukuh 1976 a mihca 2 a bulad 1 a demiad" Te-kow migingkiway tu u-li, saayaway patizeng a tademaw tu lyng-ce-li-sye, Ke-pen-ha-ken-sye-pay u situngusay a tademaw. 1933 a mihcaan, ci Hay-sen-paw zayhan "patizeng tu lyng-ce-li-sye atu pakayni maazih ku cinay malecad a su caay ka lacad ku uzip," 1932 a mihcaan pakala tu now-pey-al-u-li-sye a kawlah. sakay u-li-syeay ........angangan aca Hay-sen-paw cayay kahapinang amahini" atu S ci-cen a kamu". u "lyang-ce-lun-te-u-li-sye-yen-li" niza tungusay lyang-ce-sye tizaay a ku-tyen a nisulitan. nikauzpanÁĒüŚĻ≥ Wi-al-na.Hay-sen-paw 1901 a mihca 12 a bulad 5 a demiad lecuhan i Te-kow Wi-al-ce-paw, 1920 a mihcaan makay Mow-ni-hye a cong-sye pahezek namicudad hawsa i Mow-ni-hey talakaway a cacudadan minanam tu u-li-sye, saydan makay A-now.su-mu-bey, Wi-len.Wien, 1922 a mihcaan tu kasienawan maniyul tayza i Ke-tin-ken talakaway a cacudadan, saydan makay Ma-ke-s.pow-en "1954 a mihcaan Now-pye-al-u-li-sye a kawlah" Tan-mu-s-Ba-lan-kek "1925 a mihcuan Now-pye-al-u-li-sye a kawlah" aci Ta-wi.Si-al-pow-te. sakatusa a kalpacawan nu kitakit pahezek hasa, ciniza atu zuma a Te-kow-u-li-sye-cya mala u malubuay, mapatayza nu Amilika i Ing-kow Farm Hall. 1946 a mihcaan muliyaw panukas tayza i Te-kow, ciniza atu kaput niza muliyaw patizeng tu Ke-ten-ken-u-li a pigingkiwan, uyni a pigingkiwan i 1948 a mihcaan pasumad tu ngangan Ma-ke-s.Pu-lang-ke-u-li-sye a pigingkiwan han. 1948 a mihcaan i Ing-kow-cyen-cyaw musakamu pasubana' tu micudaday tu pinaay a bulad ciniza, 1950 a mihcaan atu 1954 a mihcaan matakus aca tayza i Amilika musakamu pasubana' tu micudaday, 1955 a mihcaan tu kasienawan i Su-ke-lan a Sen-an-te-lu-s talakaway a cacudadan pasubana' tu cudad ciniza, uyni a picudad zikuz patahka malacudad. 1955 a mihcaan mala Ma-ke-s-Pu-lang-ke-u-li nu pigingkiwan a cu-zen, pigingkiwan maladay mabulaw tayza i Mu-ni-hey, 1958 a mihcaan mala Mu-ni-hey nu talakaway a cacudadan a u-li-sye cyawsu, u pigingkiwan niza mapasumad ku ngangan "Ma-ke-s.Pu-lang-ke-u-li-sye atu ten-ti-u-li-sye a pigingkiwan"han "ayza u Ma-ke-s.Pu-lang-ke ten-ti-u-li-sye a pigingkiwan" han. 1948 " . Hay-sen-paw i 1937 a mihcaan aci I-li-sa-pay.Su-ma-he "Elisabeth Schumacher" malaacawa, 7 ku nipahabay tu wawa, i Mow-ni-hey ku eneng. 1976 a mihca 2 a bulad 1 a demiad, zayhan sigang i luma' mabelec. ¬∑Ťąíť¶¨ŤĶę(Elisabeth Schumacher)ÁĶźŚ©ö,Ťā≤śúČ7ŚÄčŚ≠©Ś≠ź, . migingkiwÁ†ĒÁ©∂ Hay-sen-paw a ngangan mahiza atu ciniza tu lyang-ce-li-sye-li-lin mapulung makakabit, uyni a lilun musakamu hawsa u mihcaan niza 23 dada' ku mihcaan niza, zayhan ciniza patahkal kuyni a li-lun atu amicukaymas "sangalebu u cin a maazih misaliyuk zumaay a kasahiza", 1932 a mihcaan pakala tu Now-pey-al u-li-sye a kawlah "1933 a mihcaan pakawlah". (1933ŚĻīť†íÁôľ). 1957 a mihcaan malingatu Hay-sen-paway a pigingkiw manamuh pasayza tu tyen-cyang-u-li atu akuti'ay a bakudang pangil a munday, atu Ze-ney-wa a kanatal yen-ce-u-li a pigingkiw kedec a makakadum, ciniza ku situngusa tu pigingkiwan a ke-sye lekakawa wi-yen-huy-cu-si, uyza tu uyni wi-yen-huy sakaput a tademaw. ciniza i 1953 a mihcaan mala cu-si nu Hung-paw ci-cin-huy zikuz, sakay ci-cin-huy yadah ku picuzuh tu kawaw, mitakus ciniza tu kasa kanatal a ke-sye-cya tayni i Te-kow, amiedap tuhenian i Te-kow palahad tu migingkiway a a kawaw.1953 a mihcaan malingatu, u li-lun a kawaw niza pasayza patatungus tu li-ce palalecad a li-lun, uyni sakay cinizaan, u matineng tu patatungus tu li-ce u-li-sye a angangan. caay pakala tu Ma-ke-s.Pu-langke a kawlah dada', Te-i-ce makakadum mapulungay a kanatal sikawlah tu nu sakakaay a nipakawlah tu kakapah nu kawaw, Nu-pey-al-u-li-sye a akawlahan, ci Hay-sen-paw mapangangan tu kasenengan a pow-s nu Pu-lu-say-al talakaway a cacudadan, Ka-al-s-lu-e talakaway a cacudadan atu Pu-ta-pey-s a talakaway a cacudadan. nu Lun-tun hwng-cya-huyay a huy-yen ciniza, atu Ke-tin-ken, Pa-ke-li-ya, Sa-ke-sen, Pu-lu-s, Luy-tin, Low-ma-ni-ya,Now-wi, Si-pan-ya , He-lan, Low-ma, Amilika kakatuud nu ke-sye-sye-huy a sakaput, Te-kow ke-ci-sye-yen atu I-ta-li ke-sye-yen a yen-s. 1953 a mihcaan mala cu-si nu Hung-paw ci-cin-huy. Hay-sen-paw na u Te-kow he-u-ci-ba a lekakawaw milihiza migingkiw misanga'ay, nika na-suy Te-kow namalingatu a pahezek nayay ku icelang he-u-ci makay li-lun mala nu ayzaay. ci Hay-sen-paw pawapen tu zuma a akam, tatenga' caay patatenga' ciniza tu pikuwan ni Si-te-le, namahiza misaicelang mitatel tu lekakawaw pigingkiw nu Na-suy Te-kow. nika Ku-te-s-mi-te mihalhal tu zuma a tademaw sakay uyni hengheng a kamuan, uyni mapangangan tu "Hay-sen-paw-ce-mi" han.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == wi-ar~…ĺ-na.ńßaj-s…ôn-paw "kamu nu t…ô, w…ôrn…ôr ńß…ôis…ônb…ôrg, **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad * d…ômiad katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad" t…ô-kow migiŇčkiwaj tu u-r~…ĺi, saajawaj patiz…ôŇč a tad…ômaw tu r~…ĺjŇč- ¶…ô-r~…ĺi-sj…ô, k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ôn-sj…ô-paj u situŇčusaj a tad…ômaw. **** a mińß ¶aan, ¶i ńßaj-s…ôn-paw zajńßan "patiz…ôŇč tu r~…ĺjŇč- ¶…ô-r~…ĺi-sj…ô atu pakajni maazińß ku ¶inaj mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a su ¶aaj ka r~…ĺa ¶ad ku uzip," **** a mińß ¶aan pakar~…ĺa tu now-p…ô-ar~…ĺ-u-r~…ĺi-sj…ô a kawr~…ĺańß. sakaj u-r~…ĺi-sj…ôaj ........aŇčaŇčan a ¶a ńßaj-s…ôn-paw ¶ajaj kańßapinaŇč amańßini" atu s ¶i- ¶…ôn a kamu". u "r~…ĺjaŇč- ¶…ô-r~…ĺun-t…ô-u-r~…ĺi-sj…ô-j…ôn-r~…ĺi" niza tuŇčusaj r~…ĺjaŇč- ¶…ô-sj…ô tizaaj a ku-tj…ôn a nisur~…ĺitan. nikauzpan** wi-ar~…ĺ-na.ńßaj-s…ôn-paw **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i t…ô-kow wi-ar~…ĺ- ¶…ô-paw, **** a mińß ¶aan makaj mow-ni-ńßj…ô a ¶oŇč-sj…ô pańß…ôz…ôk nami ¶udad ńßawsa i mow-ni-ńß…ô tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan minanam tu u-r~…ĺi-sj…ô, sajdan makaj a-now.su-mu-b…ô, wi-r~…ĺ…ôn.wi…ôn, **** a mińß ¶aan tu kasi…ônawan manijur~…ĺ tajza i k…ô-tin-k…ôn tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan, sajdan makaj ma-k…ô-s.pow-…ôn "**** a mińß ¶aan now-pj…ô-ar~…ĺ-u-r~…ĺi-sj…ô a kawr~…ĺańß" tan-mu-s-ba-r~…ĺan-k…ôk "**** a mińß ¶uan now-pj…ô-ar~…ĺ-u-r~…ĺi-sj…ô a kawr~…ĺańß" a ¶i ta-wi.si-ar~…ĺ-pow-t…ô. sakatusa a kar~…ĺpa ¶awan nu kitakit pańß…ôz…ôk ńßasa, ¶iniza atu zuma a t…ô-kow-u-r~…ĺi-sj…ô- ¶ja mar~…ĺa u mar~…ĺubuaj, mapatajza nu amir~…ĺika i iŇč-kow farm ńßar~…ĺr~…ĺ. **** a mińß ¶aan mur~…ĺijaw panukas tajza i t…ô-kow, ¶iniza atu kaput niza mur~…ĺijaw patiz…ôŇč tu k…ô-t…ôn-k…ôn-u-r~…ĺi a pigiŇčkiwan, ujni a pigiŇčkiwan i **** a mińß ¶aan pasumad tu ŇčaŇčan ma-k…ô-s.pu-r~…ĺaŇč-k…ô-u-r~…ĺi-sj…ô a pigiŇčkiwan ńßan. **** a mińß ¶aan i iŇč-kow- ¶j…ôn- ¶jaw musakamu pasubana Ē~ ° tu mi ¶udadaj tu pinaaj a bur~…ĺad ¶iniza, **** a mińß ¶aan atu **** a mińß ¶aan matakus a ¶a tajza i amir~…ĺika musakamu pasubana Ē~ ° tu mi ¶udadaj, **** a mińß ¶aan tu kasi…ônawan i su-k…ô-r~…ĺan a s…ôn-an-t…ô-r~…ĺu-s tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan pasubana Ē~ ° tu ¶udad ¶iniza, ujni a pi ¶udad zikuz patańßka mar~…ĺa ¶udad. **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa ma-k…ô-s-pu-r~…ĺaŇč-k…ô-u-r~…ĺi nu pigiŇčkiwan a ¶u-z…ôn, pigiŇčkiwan mar~…ĺadaj mabur~…ĺaw tajza i mu-ni-ńß…ô, **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa mu-ni-ńß…ô nu tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan a u-r~…ĺi-sj…ô ¶jawsu, u pigiŇčkiwan niza mapasumad ku ŇčaŇčan "ma-k…ô-s.pu-r~…ĺaŇč-k…ô-u-r~…ĺi-sj…ô atu t…ôn-ti-u-r~…ĺi-sj…ô a pigiŇčkiwan"ńßan "ajza u ma-k…ô-s.pu-r~…ĺaŇč-k…ô t…ôn-ti-u-r~…ĺi-sj…ô a pigiŇčkiwan" ńßan. **** " . ńßaj-s…ôn-paw i **** a mińß ¶aan a ¶i i-r~…ĺi-sa-paj.su-ma-ńß…ô "…ôr~…ĺisab…ôtńß s ¶ńßuma ¶ńß…ôr" mar~…ĺaa ¶awa, * ku nipańßabaj tu wawa, i mow-ni-ńß…ô ku …ôn…ôŇč. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad, zajńßan sigaŇč i r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° mab…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶. ****(…ôr~…ĺisab…ôtńß s ¶ńßuma ¶ńß…ôr)**,******, . migiŇčkiw** ńßaj-s…ôn-paw a ŇčaŇčan mańßiza atu ¶iniza tu r~…ĺjaŇč- ¶…ô-r~…ĺi-sj…ô-r~…ĺi-r~…ĺin mapur~…ĺuŇč makakabit, ujni a r~…ĺir~…ĺun musakamu ńßawsa u mińß ¶aan niza ** dada Ē~ ° ku mińß ¶aan niza, zajńßan ¶iniza patańßkar~…ĺ kujni a r~…ĺi-r~…ĺun atu ami ¶ukajmas "saŇčar~…ĺ…ôbu u ¶in a maazińß misar~…ĺijuk zumaaj a kasańßiza", **** a mińß ¶aan pakar~…ĺa tu now-p…ô-ar~…ĺ u-r~…ĺi-sj…ô a kawr~…ĺańß "**** a mińß ¶aan pakawr~…ĺańß". (*******). **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu ńßaj-s…ôn-pawaj a pigiŇčkiw manamuńß pasajza tu tj…ôn- ¶jaŇč-u-r~…ĺi atu akuti Ē~ °aj a bakudaŇč paŇčir~…ĺ a mundaj, atu z…ô-n…ô-wa a kanatar~…ĺ j…ôn- ¶…ô-u-r~…ĺi a pigiŇčkiw k…ôd…ô ¶ a makakadum, ¶iniza ku situŇčusa tu pigiŇčkiwan a k…ô-sj…ô r~…ĺ…ôkakawa wi-j…ôn-ńßuj- ¶u-si, ujza tu ujni wi-j…ôn-ńßuj sakaput a tad…ômaw. ¶iniza i **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa ¶u-si nu ńßuŇč-paw ¶i- ¶in-ńßuj zikuz, sakaj ¶i- ¶in-ńßuj jadańß ku pi ¶uzuńß tu kawaw, mitakus ¶iniza tu kasa kanatar~…ĺ a k…ô-sj…ô- ¶ja tajni i t…ô-kow, ami…ôdap tuńß…ônian i t…ô-kow par~…ĺańßad tu migiŇčkiwaj a a kawaw.**** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu, u r~…ĺi-r~…ĺun a kawaw niza pasajza patatuŇčus tu r~…ĺi- ¶…ô par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a r~…ĺi-r~…ĺun, ujni sakaj ¶inizaan, u matin…ôŇč tu patatuŇčus tu r~…ĺi- ¶…ô u-r~…ĺi-sj…ô a aŇčaŇčan. ¶aaj pakar~…ĺa tu ma-k…ô-s.pu-r~…ĺaŇčk…ô a kawr~…ĺańß dada Ē~ °, t…ô-i- ¶…ô makakadum mapur~…ĺuŇčaj a kanatar~…ĺ sikawr~…ĺańß tu nu sakakaaj a nipakawr~…ĺańß tu kakapańß nu kawaw, nu-p…ô-ar~…ĺ-u-r~…ĺi-sj…ô a akawr~…ĺańßan, ¶i ńßaj-s…ôn-paw mapaŇčaŇčan tu kas…ôn…ôŇčan a pow-s nu pu-r~…ĺu-saj-ar~…ĺ tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan, ka-ar~…ĺ-s-r~…ĺu-…ô tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan atu pu-ta-p…ô-s a tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan. nu r~…ĺun-tun ńßwŇč- ¶ja-ńßujaj a ńßuj-j…ôn ¶iniza, atu k…ô-tin-k…ôn, pa-k…ô-r~…ĺi-ja, sa-k…ô-s…ôn, pu-r~…ĺu-s, r~…ĺuj-tin, r~…ĺow-ma-ni-ja,now-wi, si-pan-ja , ńß…ô-r~…ĺan, r~…ĺow-ma, amir~…ĺika kakatuud nu k…ô-sj…ô-sj…ô-ńßuj a sakaput, t…ô-kow k…ô- ¶i-sj…ô-j…ôn atu i-ta-r~…ĺi k…ô-sj…ô-j…ôn a j…ôn-s. **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa ¶u-si nu ńßuŇč-paw ¶i- ¶in-ńßuj. ńßaj-s…ôn-paw na u t…ô-kow ńß…ô-u- ¶i-ba a r~…ĺ…ôkakawaw mir~…ĺińßiza migiŇčkiw misaŇča Ē~ °aj, nika na-suj t…ô-kow namar~…ĺiŇčatu a pańß…ôz…ôk najaj ku i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ńß…ô-u- ¶i makaj r~…ĺi-r~…ĺun mar~…ĺa nu ajzaaj. ¶i ńßaj-s…ôn-paw pawap…ôn tu zuma a akam, tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° ¶aaj patat…ôŇča Ē~ ° ¶iniza tu pikuwan ni si-t…ô-r~…ĺ…ô, namańßiza misai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč mitat…ôr~…ĺ tu r~…ĺ…ôkakawaw pigiŇčkiw nu na-suj t…ô-kow. nika ku-t…ô-s-mi-t…ô mińßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺ tu zuma a tad…ômaw sakaj ujni ńß…ôŇčńß…ôŇč a kamuan, ujni mapaŇčaŇčan tu "ńßaj-s…ôn-paw- ¶…ô-mi" ńßan.
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Wi-al-na.Hay-sen-paw "kamu nu Te, Werner Heisenberg, 1901 a mihca 12 a bulad 5 demiad katukuh 1976 a mihca 2 a bulad 1 a demiad" Te-kow migingkiway tu u-li, saayaway patizeng a tademaw tu lyng-ce-li-sye, Ke-pen-ha-ken-sye-pay u situngusay a tademaw. 1933 a mihcaan, ci Hay-sen-paw zayhan "patizeng tu lyng-ce-li-sye atu pakayni maazih ku cinay malecad a su caay ka lacad ku uzip," 1932 a mihcaan pakala tu now-pey-al-u-li-sye a kawlah. sakay u-li-syeay ........angangan aca Hay-sen-paw cayay kahapinang amahini" atu S ci-cen a kamu". u "lyang-ce-lun-te-u-li-sye-yen-li" niza tungusay lyang-ce-sye tizaay a ku-tyen a nisulitan. nikauzpanÁĒüŚĻ≥ Wi-al-na.Hay-sen-paw 1901 a mihca 12 a bulad 5 a demiad lecuhan i Te-kow Wi-al-ce-paw, 1920 a mihcaan makay Mow-ni-hye a cong-sye pahezek namicudad hawsa i Mow-ni-hey talakaway a cacudadan minanam tu u-li-sye, saydan makay A-now.su-mu-bey, Wi-len.Wien, 1922 a mihcaan tu kasienawan maniyul tayza i Ke-tin-ken talakaway a cacudadan, saydan makay Ma-ke-s.pow-en "1954 a mihcaan Now-pye-al-u-li-sye a kawlah" Tan-mu-s-Ba-lan-kek "1925 a mihcuan Now-pye-al-u-li-sye a kawlah" aci Ta-wi.Si-al-pow-te. sakatusa a kalpacawan nu kitakit pahezek hasa, ciniza atu zuma a Te-kow-u-li-sye-cya mala u malubuay, mapatayza nu Amilika i Ing-kow Farm Hall. 1946 a mihcaan muliyaw panukas tayza i Te-kow, ciniza atu kaput niza muliyaw patizeng tu Ke-ten-ken-u-li a pigingkiwan, uyni a pigingkiwan i 1948 a mihcaan pasumad tu ngangan Ma-ke-s.Pu-lang-ke-u-li-sye a pigingkiwan han. 1948 a mihcaan i Ing-kow-cyen-cyaw musakamu pasubana' tu micudaday tu pinaay a bulad ciniza, 1950 a mihcaan atu 1954 a mihcaan matakus aca tayza i Amilika musakamu pasubana' tu micudaday, 1955 a mihcaan tu kasienawan i Su-ke-lan a Sen-an-te-lu-s talakaway a cacudadan pasubana' tu cudad ciniza, uyni a picudad zikuz patahka malacudad. 1955 a mihcaan mala Ma-ke-s-Pu-lang-ke-u-li nu pigingkiwan a cu-zen, pigingkiwan maladay mabulaw tayza i Mu-ni-hey, 1958 a mihcaan mala Mu-ni-hey nu talakaway a cacudadan a u-li-sye cyawsu, u pigingkiwan niza mapasumad ku ngangan "Ma-ke-s.Pu-lang-ke-u-li-sye atu ten-ti-u-li-sye a pigingkiwan"han "ayza u Ma-ke-s.Pu-lang-ke ten-ti-u-li-sye a pigingkiwan" han. 1948 " . Hay-sen-paw i 1937 a mihcaan aci I-li-sa-pay.Su-ma-he "Elisabeth Schumacher" malaacawa, 7 ku nipahabay tu wawa, i Mow-ni-hey ku eneng. 1976 a mihca 2 a bulad 1 a demiad, zayhan sigang i luma' mabelec. ¬∑Ťąíť¶¨ŤĶę(Elisabeth Schumacher)ÁĶźŚ©ö,Ťā≤śúČ7ŚÄčŚ≠©Ś≠ź, . migingkiwÁ†ĒÁ©∂ Hay-sen-paw a ngangan mahiza atu ciniza tu lyang-ce-li-sye-li-lin mapulung makakabit, uyni a lilun musakamu hawsa u mihcaan niza 23 dada' ku mihcaan niza, zayhan ciniza patahkal kuyni a li-lun atu amicukaymas "sangalebu u cin a maazih misaliyuk zumaay a kasahiza", 1932 a mihcaan pakala tu Now-pey-al u-li-sye a kawlah "1933 a mihcaan pakawlah". (1933ŚĻīť†íÁôľ). 1957 a mihcaan malingatu Hay-sen-paway a pigingkiw manamuh pasayza tu tyen-cyang-u-li atu akuti'ay a bakudang pangil a munday, atu Ze-ney-wa a kanatal yen-ce-u-li a pigingkiw kedec a makakadum, ciniza ku situngusa tu pigingkiwan a ke-sye lekakawa wi-yen-huy-cu-si, uyza tu uyni wi-yen-huy sakaput a tademaw. ciniza i 1953 a mihcaan mala cu-si nu Hung-paw ci-cin-huy zikuz, sakay ci-cin-huy yadah ku picuzuh tu kawaw, mitakus ciniza tu kasa kanatal a ke-sye-cya tayni i Te-kow, amiedap tuhenian i Te-kow palahad tu migingkiway a a kawaw.1953 a mihcaan malingatu, u li-lun a kawaw niza pasayza patatungus tu li-ce palalecad a li-lun, uyni sakay cinizaan, u matineng tu patatungus tu li-ce u-li-sye a angangan. caay pakala tu Ma-ke-s.Pu-langke a kawlah dada', Te-i-ce makakadum mapulungay a kanatal sikawlah tu nu sakakaay a nipakawlah tu kakapah nu kawaw, Nu-pey-al-u-li-sye a akawlahan, ci Hay-sen-paw mapangangan tu kasenengan a pow-s nu Pu-lu-say-al talakaway a cacudadan, Ka-al-s-lu-e talakaway a cacudadan atu Pu-ta-pey-s a talakaway a cacudadan. nu Lun-tun hwng-cya-huyay a huy-yen ciniza, atu Ke-tin-ken, Pa-ke-li-ya, Sa-ke-sen, Pu-lu-s, Luy-tin, Low-ma-ni-ya,Now-wi, Si-pan-ya , He-lan, Low-ma, Amilika kakatuud nu ke-sye-sye-huy a sakaput, Te-kow ke-ci-sye-yen atu I-ta-li ke-sye-yen a yen-s. 1953 a mihcaan mala cu-si nu Hung-paw ci-cin-huy. Hay-sen-paw na u Te-kow he-u-ci-ba a lekakawaw milihiza migingkiw misanga'ay, nika na-suy Te-kow namalingatu a pahezek nayay ku icelang he-u-ci makay li-lun mala nu ayzaay. ci Hay-sen-paw pawapen tu zuma a akam, tatenga' caay patatenga' ciniza tu pikuwan ni Si-te-le, namahiza misaicelang mitatel tu lekakawaw pigingkiw nu Na-suy Te-kow. nika Ku-te-s-mi-te mihalhal tu zuma a tademaw sakay uyni hengheng a kamuan, uyni mapangangan tu "Hay-sen-paw-ce-mi" han.
